questions.question: Which is the longest river in Europe?
questions.explanation: The Volga is the longest river in Europe at 3,530 km.

questions.question: Which European country has the most UNESCO World Heritage Sites?
questions.explanation: Italy has the most UNESCO World Heritage Sites in Europe.

questions.question: What is the smallest country in Europe?
questions.explanation: Vatican City is the smallest country in both Europe and the world at 0.44 km².

questions.question: Which strait separates Europe from Asia?
questions.explanation: The Bosphorus strait in Istanbul separates Europe from Asia.

questions.question: Mount Elbrus, the highest peak in Europe, is located in which country?
questions.explanation: Mount Elbrus (5,642 m) is in the Caucasus Mountains of Russia.

questions.question: Which European country has the most islands?
questions.explanation: Sweden has approximately 267,570 islands, the most of any European country.

questions.question: Which two European countries are doubly landlocked?
questions.explanation: Liechtenstein and Uzbekistan are the only doubly landlocked countries in the world.

questions.question: What is the deepest lake in Europe?
questions.explanation: Hornindalsvatnet in Norway is the deepest lake in Europe at 514 m.

questions.question: Which European capital is located on two continents?
questions.explanation: Istanbul spans both Europe and Asia, divided by the Bosphorus.

questions.question: Which country does NOT border France?
questions.explanation: The Netherlands does not share a land border with mainland France.

questions.question: What is the largest island in the Mediterranean Sea?
questions.explanation: Sicily is the largest Mediterranean island at 25,711 km².

questions.question: Which European country has the highest population density?
questions.explanation: Monaco has the highest population density in Europe and the world.

questions.question: The Danube River flows through how many capital cities?
questions.explanation: The Danube flows through Vienna, Bratislava, Budapest, and Belgrade.

questions.question: Which Scandinavian country is NOT part of the European Union?
questions.explanation: Norway is not an EU member, though it participates in the EEA.

questions.question: Which European country is home to the Plitvice Lakes?
questions.explanation: Plitvice Lakes National Park is a UNESCO site in Croatia.
